BackOfficeFleet (BOF) — Insurance and Claims Operations
TEMPLATE 1: INSURANCE NOTICE / COI REQUEST
Template 1 of 9  |  
Editable Template
Formal notice requesting a Certificate of Insurance (COI) from a carrier, driver, or vendor — used to ensure insurance requirements are met before dispatch or to track expiring coverage.

•  
Triggers insurance compliance verification workflow
•  
Triggers dispatch hold if COI not received by deadline
•  
Triggers settlement hold if coverage lapses
•  
Triggers auto-escalation on expiration dates
•  
Triggers command center watch for non-compliant carriers
•  
Triggers DQF status update for affected drivers
•  
Triggers follow-up reminder tracking
BackOfficeFleet (BOF) — Insurance and Claims Operations
TEMPLATE 2: ADDITIONAL INSURED REQUEST
Template 2 of 9  |  
Editable Template
Used when a customer, facility, or broker requires additional insured status on a carrier's or BOF's insurance policy — tracks endorsement requests, deadlines, and completion.

•  
Triggers additional insured endorsement workflow
•  
Triggers insurance carrier communication
•  
Triggers dispatch hold if endorsement not received by deadline
•  
Triggers settlement hold if unresolved
•  
Triggers updated COI issuance and distribution
•  
Triggers command center watch for loads requiring endorsement
•  
Triggers notification to operations upon completion
BackOfficeFleet (BOF) — Insurance and Claims Operations
TEMPLATE 3: FACILITY INSURANCE REQUIREMENT NOTICE
Template 3 of 9  |  
Generated / Autofill Output
Documents facility-specific insurance requirements pulled from customer contracts, facility profiles, or BOF route memory — provided to operations and insurance team before dispatch to a facility with special insurance requirements. Designed as a reusable BOF facility risk profile.

•  
Triggers facility-specific insurance verification before dispatch
•  
Triggers additional insured endorsement request if required
•  
Triggers COI delivery workflow to facility
•  
Triggers dispatch block if insurance not verified
•  
Triggers route memory storage for future loads
•  
Triggers auto-application to carriers dispatched to this facility
•  
Triggers command center alert if non-compliant at arrival
BackOfficeFleet (BOF) — Insurance and Claims Operations
TEMPLATE 4: CLAIM INTAKE FORM
Template 4 of 9  |  
Editable Template
Primary form for logging a new cargo, equipment, property, or liability claim — one of the most important forms in the BOF system. Captures all initial claim details, triggers investigation, and initiates settlement hold and notification workflows.

Triggers settlement hold on affected load
•  
Triggers insurance company notification and claim filing
•  
Triggers customer / broker notification
•  
Triggers reserve tracking and financial exposure monitoring
•  
Triggers Carmack Amendment liability review if applicable
•  
Triggers claims-sensitive flag on load history
•  
Triggers command center watch / priority tracking
•  
Triggers supporting document collection workflow
•  
Triggers claim support packet assembly

•  
Triggers damage assessment update to linked claim
•  
Triggers reserve adjustment based on actual damage
•  
Triggers salvage and disposition workflow
•  
Triggers root cause investigation and corrective action
•  
Triggers insurance company notification with damage details
•  
Triggers settlement hold update on affected load
•  
Triggers equipment maintenance review if equipment-related
•  
Triggers command center update with damage severity

•  
Triggers incident investigation workflow
•  
Triggers safety review and corrective action
•  
Triggers insurance notification and potential claim filing
•  
Triggers settlement hold on affected load
•  
Triggers DOT / FMCSA reporting if recordable
•  
Triggers drug / alcohol testing if required
•  
Triggers DQF update for affected driver
•  
Triggers driver status review and return-to-duty process
•  
Triggers command center watch / priority tracking
•  
Triggers post-incident follow-up schedule
BackOfficeFleet (BOF) — Insurance and Claims Operations
TEMPLATE 7: POLICE REPORT COVER SHEET
Template 7 of 9  |  
Editable Template
Organizes police report documentation when a BOF-managed load involves law enforcement — tracks report acquisition, distribution, and follow-up for insurance, legal, and claims workflows.

Triggers police report acquisition and tracking
•

•  
Triggers attorney review workflow if litigation potential
•  
Triggers supplemental report follow-up
•

•  
Triggers claim file update with police report
•  
Triggers command center update for law enforcement involvement
BackOfficeFleet (BOF) — Insurance and Claims Operations
TEMPLATE 8: CLAIM SUPPORT PACKET COVER
Template 8 of 9  |  
Generated / Autofill Output
Claims-side equivalent of the Billing Packet Cover Sheet — assembles all supporting documentation for a claim into a single organized packet for insurance filing, legal review, or settlement processing.

•  
Triggers claim packet assembly and validation workflow
•  
Triggers insurance filing submission
•  
Triggers legal review if litigation potential
•  
Triggers settlement hold enforcement until claim resolved
•  
Triggers reserve tracking and financial exposure monitoring
•  
Triggers packet completeness verification
•  
Triggers command center priority tracking
•  
Triggers claim resolution workflow upon completion
BackOfficeFleet (BOF) — Insurance and Claims Operations
TEMPLATE 9: HIGH-VALUE CARGO REVIEW SHEET
Template 9 of 9  |  
Editable Template
BOF's HIGH-VALUE CARGO PROTOCOL — a strategic differentiator that ensures premium handling, enhanced security, and executive-level oversight for loads exceeding defined value thresholds. This represents BOF's commitment to protecting high-value freight with an elevated standard of care.

•  
Triggers BOF high-value cargo protocol for the assigned load
•  
Triggers dispatch block until executive-level approval is obtained
•  
Triggers enhanced proof collection requirements at every stop
•  
Triggers real-time GPS tracking and driver check-in enforcement
•  
Triggers security protocol activation (escort, secure parking, no-stop policy)
•  
Triggers insurance coverage review and potential excess value filing
•  
Triggers claims-sensitive flag on load
•  
Triggers elevated command center priority and watch
•  
Triggers post-delivery review and close-out workflow
•  
Triggers settlement hold if enhanced proof requirements are not fully met
